name: DEXA Bone Density Scan Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for dual-energy x-ray absorptiometry (DEXA/DXA) bone density scans. Used in osteoporosis screening and management measures for women.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA), bone density study, 1 or more sites; axial skeleton (e.g., hips, pelvis, spine)
Dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA), bone density study, 1 or more sites; appendicular skeleton (peripheral)
Dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA), bone density study, 1 or more sites; axial skeleton, with vertebral fracture assessment
Vertebral fracture assessment via dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA)
CT bone mineral density study, 1 or more sites; axial skeleton
Ultrasonic bone density measurement and interpretation, peripheral site(s)
Single energy x-ray absorptiometry (SEXA) bone density study, one or more sites; appendicular skeleton
